message:
✨ Add EPG timeshift, episode info, IMDB link, info panel layout (#44)

- Add per-channel EPG timeshift via right-click context menu
- Timeshift adjusts programme positions in guide and info panel
- Add episode number parsing (XMLTV_NS and SxxExx formats)
- Show episode info with clickable IMDB search link
- Move provider badge and current time to top-right of info panel
- Reduce description to 1 line to prevent overflow
- Store subtitle and episodeNum from EPG data

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
